template.name: Podcast — Champagne Studio
template.description: Editorial 8-scene podcast bundle: warm linen covers, navy editorial panels, refined typography, clean photo framing, and entrance animations on every layer.

scenes.title: Welcome to the Show
scenes.description: Elegant cover with show title, hook, and studio portrait.

clips.content: A polished introduction to your show — who you are, what listeners can expect, and why this conversation matters. Replace with your episode hook.

backgroundConfig.hint: Swap linen presets, custom swatches, or full-bleed photos. Delete a hero image to reveal the panel color behind it.

scenes.title: The Art of Listening
scenes.description: Photo panel left, narrative copy right.

clips.content: Great podcasts are built on presence, not production tricks. When hosts sound grounded and curious, audiences lean in — even through a screen or earbuds.
This episode explores the craft behind compelling audio: pacing, authenticity, and the small details that make a conversation feel alive.

backgroundConfig.hint: Swap linen presets, custom swatches, or full-bleed photos. Delete a hero image to reveal the panel color behind it.

scenes.title: Why Podcasts Connect
scenes.description: Navy copy panel with overlapping hero image.

clips.content: Podcasts create intimacy at scale. One voice in your ear can feel like a friend, a mentor, or a guide through ideas worth your time.

backgroundConfig.hint: Swap linen presets, custom swatches, or full-bleed photos. Delete a hero image to reveal the panel color behind it.

scenes.title: Guest Spotlight
scenes.description: Circular guest portrait with elegant quote card.

clips.content: "The shows I keep coming back to feel unscripted but intentional — like the host is thinking with me, not at me."

backgroundConfig.hint: Swap linen presets, custom swatches, or full-bleed photos. Delete a hero image to reveal the panel color behind it.

scenes.title: Episode Segments
scenes.description: Three segment cards with clean photo thumbs.

clips.content: Three beats that structure this episode. Swap photos for your own studio shots, guest clips, or behind-the-scenes moments.
Set the tone in the first sixty seconds — hook, context, and a reason to stay.
The heart of the episode where ideas unfold naturally between host and guest.
Land the takeaway, tease what is next, and invite listeners to engage.

backgroundConfig.hint: Swap linen presets, custom swatches, or full-bleed photos. Delete a hero image to reveal the panel color behind it.

clips.content: Where the show is headed — live events, new formats, and collaborations that expand what listeners can expect.
Record in front of audiences and build community in person.
Video clips, newsletters, and bonus episodes for subscribers.
Cross-promote with aligned shows and expert guests.

scenes.title: Partner Message
scenes.description: Clean sponsor copy with navy CTA card — no loud gradients.

clips.content:
This Episode Is
Brought To You By
A brief, honest mention of the partner who makes this episode possible. Keep the tone natural — your audience trusts recommendations that sound like you.

scenes.title: Thank You for Listening
scenes.description: Refined closing with subscribe pills and social links.

clips.content: Thank you for listening. Subscribe wherever you get podcasts, leave a review, and share this episode with someone who would enjoy it.
